name: genflowai-codex-plugin
description: Search GenflowAI templates, upload assets, run AI creative workflows, and poll async image/video generation results from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Run AI creative workflows from Codex.
interface.longDescription: GenflowAI helps Codex discover reusable AI creative workflow templates for ecommerce product visuals, AI product photography, UGC video ads, AI ad creatives, product video generation, image-to-video workflows, text-to-video workflows, fashion editorials, jewelry campaigns, perfume visuals, Amazon assets, and social media content. With a GenflowAI API key, the plugin can upload image, video, and audio assets, start async template or saved workflow runs, poll status, inspect run progress, and return generated image/video/audio/text outputs.
defaultPrompt: Find a GenflowAI template for AI product photography
Upload a product image and run a GenflowAI template
Check the status of my GenflowAI generation task
